What-If Rebalancer — NDPMS IC decision sandbox

Read-only sandbox · edits never touch the live dashboard · Ionic Wealth
Reconciliation: pending… Self-test: not run
Preset: Rajnish Kumar — "Financials shift / factor 50:25:25 / commodities 20% at 85:15 / +10% domestic equity into small cap"
Loads the scope, 5-instruction queue, and funding waterfall for this exact call and runs it immediately — no manual form-filling.

Scope — which clients does this call apply to?

Pick by name, by strategy, or everyone. Works identically whether you pick 1 client or all 24 — the same Run/Results stages scale naturally, no separate "book-wide mode."

Or select individual clients

ClientAccountStrategyIPS?AUM
0 clients selected.

Targets — build the instruction queue

Stack as many instructions as needed. They apply IN ORDER, per client — later instructions see the effects of earlier ones (same sequencing model as before, now generalized to every instruction type below).

Example: bucket=Domestic Equity, basis=%AUM, form=Delta, value=+10 → "Domestic equity +10%". Example: bucket=Factor:Value, basis=Current bucket level, value=50 → "reduce Value by 50% from current levels".
Example: parent=Domestic Equity, A=Large Cap / B=SMID, ratio 60:40 → "within domestic equity, 60:40 Large:SMID". Example: parent=Global Equity, A=dmEm:DM / B=dmEm:EM, ratio 60:40. Example: parent=Commodities, A=Gold / B=Silver, ratio 85:15.
Example: sell 50% of Factor:Value, buy into Factor:Momentum with the proceeds — one instruction, two legs, shown as one ticket.

Standing rule: whenever this run buys NEW money into the named category (e.g. as a funding destination or a simple-target buy leg), the money is split per this rule instead of landing in one lump fund. Existing holdings in the category are undisturbed.

Example: category=Debt, Split1="3-5Y" ratio 85 → HDFC Banking & PSU Debt Fund ISIN; Split2="30Y+" ratio 15 → HDFC Long Duration Debt Fund ISIN. This is the standing rule for "new Fixed Income purchases: 85:15 3-5Y:30Y+".

Instruction Queue

Standing new-money rules currently active: none

Funding Waterfall

Define an ORDERED list of sources. When an instruction needs funding (Rebalance / AUM-constant mode), the solver drains source 1 until the target is met or exhausted, then moves to source 2, etc. — runs independently per client (each client's own IPS breaches, underperformers, and cash differ). This waterfall applies to the whole instruction queue for this run.

Run

Solves independently for every client in scope. Baseline reconciliation runs first and gates the results — clients failing reconciliation are excluded and flagged, never silently acted on.

Clients failing baseline reconciliation (excluded from results — DO NOT ACT ON THESE):

Aggregate Summary

Results Matrix

One row per client in scope. For a single-client scope this is a matrix of one row — drill in below for the full before/after (same view either way, nothing special-cased for "book-wide").

ClientStrategyRM/SRM Per-instruction current→target Trades requiredFunding sources used Resulting IPS Status

Drill-down

Baseline Reconciliation — Engine vs. Dashboard IPS_DATA

Recomputes every IPS-covered client's numbers with the new engine and compares against the dashboard's precomputed IPS_DATA values, to within ±0.1%.

Run Self-Test

Applies a known trade to a sample client (sell exactly 33% of a named holding into cash) and asserts the expected ₹ amount, %AUM, and post-trade allocation numbers.

NDPMS What-If Rebalancer · Standalone decision-sandbox tool · Does not read from or write to the live dashboard file · Ionic Wealth NDPMS IC
